name: LTX Corporation
description: LTX Corporation was a prominent provider of semiconductor test solutions, specializing in the design, manufacture, and marketing of automatic test equipment (ATE) for the semiconductor industry. The company's systems were widely used to test system-on-a-chip, digital, analog, and mixed-signal integrated circuits. Headquartered in Massachusetts, LTX played a significant role in the semiconductor manufacturing ecosystem. In 2008, the company completed a merger with Credence Systems Corporation to form LTX-Credence Corporation, which later rebranded as Cohu, Inc. following subsequent acquisitions, marking the end of its independent operations under the LTX name.
